scripts.dev:api: uv run --project apps/api flask --app levels_api:create_app run --port 8000 --debug
scripts.lint: npm run lint:web && npm run lint:api
scripts.lint:api: uv run --project apps/api ruff check apps/api/src apps/api/tests
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:web && npm run typecheck:api
scripts.test: npm run test:web && npm run test:api
scripts.e2e: node -e "console.error('Playwright is introduced by LVL-1004'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
